Construction System

Ship and building construction per economy.md

Construction mechanics:

  • Projects have total cost and progress
  • Production applied each maintenance phase
  • Projects complete when cost paid >= cost total
Ship Construction Costs and Times (reference.md:9.1 and 9.1.1)Building Construction CostsIndustrial Unit Investment (economy.md:3.4)Construction ManagementConstruction Queue Helpers

Imports

types, ../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/units, ../config/construction_config, ../config/facilities_config, ../config/ships_config

Procs

proc advanceConstruction(colony: var Colony): Option[CompletedProject] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Advance construction by one turn (upfront payment model) Returns completed project if finished Per economy.md:5.0 - full cost paid upfront, construction tracks turns 
proc cancelConstruction(colony: var Colony): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Cancel construction and return refund (50% of total cost) Returns refunded PP amount Per economy.md:5.0 - 50% refund on cancellation 
proc createBuildingProject(buildingType: string): ConstructionProject {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create building construction project with upfront payment Per economy.md:5.0 - full cost must be paid upfront 
proc createIndustrialProject(colony: Colony; units: int): ConstructionProject {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create IU investment project with upfront payment Per economy.md:5.0 - full cost must be paid upfront 
proc createShipProject(shipClass: ShipClass; cstLevel: int = 1): ConstructionProject {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create ship construction project with upfront payment model Requires CST level to calculate actual build time Per economy.md:5.0 - full cost must be paid upfront 
proc getBuildingCost(buildingType: string): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get construction cost for building type from config Uses both construction_config and facilities_config 
proc getBuildingTime(buildingType: string): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get construction time for building type from config 
proc getIndustrialUnitCost(colony: Colony): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Calculate cost for next IU investment Cost scales based on IU percentage relative to PU

Per economy.md:3.4:

  • Up to 50% PU: 1.0x (30 PP)
  • 51-75%: 1.2x (36 PP)
  • 76-100%: 1.5x (45 PP)
  • 101-150%: 2.0x (60 PP)
  • 151%+: 2.5x (75 PP)
proc getShipBaseBuildTime(shipClass: ShipClass): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get base construction time (before CST modifier) from ships.toml Per reference.md:9.1.1 
proc getShipBuildTime(shipClass: ShipClass; cstLevel: int): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

Get actual construction time in turns with CST modifier Per reference.md:9.1.1

Formula: ceiling(base_time × (1.0 - (CST_level - 1) × 0.10)) Minimum: 1 turn

proc getShipConstructionCost(shipClass: ShipClass): int {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Get construction cost (PC) for ship class from ships.toml Per reference.md:9.1 
proc requiresSpaceport(buildingType: string): bool {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Check if building requires a spaceport 
proc startConstruction(colony: var Colony; project: ConstructionProject): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Start new construction project at colony Returns true if started successfully

Exports

ConstructionProject, CompletedProject, ConstructionType
